title: canna ellipticifolia var. lutea
intro: Canna ellipticifolia var. lutea, also known as the Yellow Canna, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cannaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Canna ellipticifolia var. lutea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
